rows.protocol_note: HealthBench scores are length-adjusted; OpenAI recomputed previous model scores and reports penalties on a 0-100 scale.
rows.protocol_short: HealthBench scores are length-adjusted; OpenAI recomputed previous model scores and reports penalties on a 0-100 scale. | OpenAI evaluates GPT-5.5...
rows.protocol_full: HealthBench scores are length-adjusted; OpenAI recomputed previous model scores and reports penalties on a 0-100 scale. | OpenAI evaluates GPT-5.5 on HealthBench and HealthBench Professional as healthcare performance/safety benchmarks. Reported values are length-adjusted scores; table cells also include unadjusted score and mean response length in characters. OpenAI notes that open-ended chat benchmarks can reward longer responses, so it reports length-adjusted HealthBench and HealthBench Professional scores. Length adjustment penalizes long answers with slopes reported as 2.53 for HealthBench Professional, 2.99 for HealthBench, 3.92 for HealthBench Hard, and 0.20 for HealthBench Consensus; shorter responses receive a corresponding positive adjustment. | Dataset: Length-adjusted HealthBench score; table includes unadjusted score and mean response length.

evaluation_setup: HealthBench scores are length-adjusted; OpenAI recomputed previous model scores and reports penalties on a 0-100 scale.
dataset_variant: Dataset: Length-adjusted HealthBench score; table includes unadjusted score and mean response length.
